data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the cancellation policy, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the cancellation process works as specified. While the linked use case mentions that cancellations more than 24 hours ahead result in an automatic refund, there are no records or evidence demonstrating that this functionality is implemented or operational. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the cancellation policy for bookings made more than 24 hours in advance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
